rule: Domains may own typed payload extensions, but Observability owns the universal root trace envelope and correlation fabric.
trace_identity_rule: One trace_id is minted at the initial user request and must flow unchanged through every workflow, orchestration decision, tool call, Gateway/Conduit boundary, Kernel receipt, Validation span, Shell projection, Sentinel observation, and final response for that causal story. No component may remint, replace, drop, or fork this ID.

extensions.required_projection: Project selected plan, rejected alternatives, confidence, step records, capability graph, and contract family into universal trace envelope payload.
Preserve Sentinel stream name, producer artifact, authority class, evidence state, freshness, finding category, invariant refs, and issue-candidate refs.
Attach controlled check identity, lifecycle state, classification, result, failure signature, and artifact refs to the universal envelope.
Preserve route, listener, process identity, health probe, lifecycle state, and recovery refs.
Preserve presentation-only authority, bounded projection refs, UI symptom, and upstream correlation without allowing Shell readiness inference.
Map external runtime probes, architecture probes, behavioral traces, and capability observations into the same envelope before assimilation transfer planning.
